name: Performance Improvement

---

## Performance Improvement

**What performance aspect would you like to improve?**

**What type of performance improvement?**
- [ ] Page load speed
- [ ] Image optimization
- [ ] Bundle size reduction
- [ ] Lazy loading
- [ ] Caching strategies
- [ ] Code splitting
- [ ] Minification
- [ ] Core Web Vitals
- [ ] Server response time
- [ ] Database optimization
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Where is this performance element located?**
- [ ] Homepage
- [ ] About page
- [ ] Portfolio page
- [ ] Skills page
- [ ] Contact page
- [ ] Global performance
- [ ] Asset loading
- [ ] API endpoints
- [ ] Database queries
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Current performance metrics**
- First Contentful Paint (FCP): [e.g. 2.5s]
- Largest Contentful Paint (LCP): [e.g. 4.2s]
- First Input Delay (FID): [e.g. 150ms]
- Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): [e.g. 0.1]

**Performance testing tools used**
- [ ] Google PageSpeed Insights
- [ ] Lighthouse
- [ ] GTmetrix
- [ ] WebPageTest
- [ ] Chrome DevTools
- [ ] New Relic
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Proposed improvement**
Describe what improvement you'd like to see.

**Expected impact**
How much improvement do you expect to see?

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (major performance issue)
- [ ] High (significant impact)
- [ ] Medium (moderate improvement)
- [ ] Low (minor optimization)

**Implementation complexity**
- [ ] Simple (quick fix)
- [ ] Moderate (some effort required)
- [ ] Complex (significant development time)
- [ ] Very complex (major refactoring)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the performance improvement here.

**Note**: Performance improvements enhance user experience and SEO!

**Note**: Faster websites lead to better user engagement and conversion rates!

**Note**: Measure before and after to validate improvements!

**Note**: Consider the 80/20 rule - focus on high-impact, low-effort improvements!
